description_long: This kiosk is a low, flat rectangular structure with a smooth, featureless surface and a small, circular element at its center. The entire body appears to be made from a single, uniform material, likely metal or concrete, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The central circular feature may serve as a hatch, access point, or maintenance cover, but no other openings, windows, or signage are visible. The surface is matte and unadorned, with no visible seams, joints, or decorative elements. Its proportions are extremely low-profile, making it more of a ground-level installation than a walk-in booth. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, with a focus on simplicity and durability.
description: A flat, rectangular kiosk with a smooth, featureless surface and a small central circular element, finished in a uniform gray material.
description_view_0: From this view, the kiosk appears as a flat gray rectangle with a small circular feature at the center.
description_view_1: This angle shows the same flat surface and central circular element, with no additional features visible.
description_view_2: The kiosk remains a flat, featureless rectangle with the central circle, viewed from a slightly different side.
description_view_3: The flat, gray surface and central circular feature are visible, with no distinguishing marks or openings.
attribute_roof_design: flat, seamless, uniform gray surface with no overhangs or decorative features
